label: CUCoreUtils
title: CUCoreUtils
lead: Small helper APIs for timing, readiness checks, PlayerPrefs accessors, world/item helpers, alerts, reflection, console bridging, keys, audio, and compression.
bodyHtml:
Timing and readiness

DelayCall, CallWhen, and StartCoroutine run work from a hidden persistent MonoBehaviour. Use AwaitWorldGeneration before touching world or player state.

yield return CUCoreUtils.AwaitWorldGeneration();

Small wrappers

GetBool, GetFloat, GetString, and their matching setters wrap PlayerPrefs so simple persisted values stay consistent without repeating boilerplate.

IsInWorld, TryGetHeldItem, GiveItem, ShowAlert, GetMousePosition, and PlaySoundAt cover common in-world interactions through the current player/body and UI/audio seams.

GetFriendlyKeyName converts raw KeyCode values into labels that read better in settings text, prompts, and rebinding UI.

Reflection, console, and compression
  • InvokeMethod and GetMethod are for rare private-method interop.
  • ConsoleLog and ConsoleCheckForWorld help commands report cleanly and fail safely when no runtime world is loaded.
  • CompressString and DecompressString are utility helpers for compact text payloads when you need lightweight save or clipboard transport.
